_comment: OPTIONAL. Adzuna already scans all boards across NL/UK/IE/DE/ES, so you don't need this list. It only exists to force-watch a few high-signal companies with clean names + full job descriptions (useful for sponsor matching). Leave the array empty to rely purely on Adzuna. ats must be greenhouse/lever/ashby; find the slug in the careers URL. Run `python scan.py --verify` to test entries.
